summary: Co-hosts under Mauricio Pochettino, leaning on 1v1 wing play and pace in behind, with physical set-piece threat. A tough, even Group D.
style: 4-2-3-1 / 3-4-3 (principles consistent under Pochettino) — lots of winger/1v1 play (Pulisic, Luna, Tillman), pace behind (Balogun, Agyemang, Weah), talented technical midfielders.

counterReliance.note: Pace in behind from a transition-friendly front line

strengths: 1v1 wide threat across the front line
Physical threat from set-plays and talented technical midfielders

keyPlayers.name: Christian Pulisic
keyPlayers.note: Pacey, direct & skilful with end product — 14 goal involvements for AC Milan, 38 chances created. Tournament poster boy under pressure to deliver

tactics: Get the wide players isolated in 1v1s, run the forwards in behind, and threaten physically from set-plays. The question is whether Pulisic delivers in the biggest moments.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
